name: updateEvent
description: Updates an existing Google Calendar event with PATCH semantics — only the fields you provide are changed; everything else stays the same. Common uses: reschedule (set start+end), retitle (set summary), add/remove attendees (set attendees array which fully replaces).

eventId.description: The event ID to update (from listEvents).

dateTime.description: RFC3339 timestamp with timezone offset, e.g. "2026-04-15T14:00:00-08:00". Use this for timed events.

date.description: ISO date "YYYY-MM-DD" for all-day events. Use instead of dateTime.

timeZone.description: IANA timezone like "America/Los_Angeles". Optional when dateTime has an offset.

attendees.description: Replaces the entire attendee list. To add one, fetch the event first.

sendUpdates.description: Whether to email attendees about the change.
